title: Keyboard only control / full shortcuts in boards

posts.author: nsgl (NS)
posts.cookedHtml:
(Not sure if this is the right forum, but support sent me here … please move elsewhere if there’s a better place.)

The Monday.com app should have full keyboard support. Currently it is not possible to use Monday.com without a mouse, as certain UI elements cannot be activated without a mouse (e.g., there is no way to create a new task/sub-task with just the keyboard). Besides, many actions can only be performed with a lot of Tab-key and Cursor-key action (e.g., expanding / collapsing sub-tasks).

An exhaustive list of the missing shortcuts would take some time to put together, but I think you get the idea.

PS: Yes, I’ve tried everything shown in SHIFT+?

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @nsgl and welcome to the community!

I hope you like it here

I have moved the post to our Feature feedback section and I will make sure that the feedback reaches the right team

Thank you for sharing!

Cheers,
-Matias

posts.author: Regan (Regan Ludwar)
posts.cookedHtml: @Matias.Monday Any update on this? Are keyboard shortcuts being considered when rolling out new features?
